styles.name: Classic Oak
styles.description: Timeless oak wood frame with natural grain patterns. Features a 1-inch moulding width and a clear satin topcoat.

styles.name: Modern Black
styles.description: Sleek black frame with clean lines. Ideal for contemporary and minimalist spaces.

styles.name: White Wood Frame
styles.description: Clean white wood finish with timeless appeal. The 0.75 inch moulding width provides classic elegance and pairs well with single or double mat configurations.

styles.name: Walnut Traditional
styles.description: Rich walnut wood with deep brown tones. Classic elegance for heirloom pieces.

styles.name: Gold Ornate
styles.description: Decorative gold frame with intricate detailing. Adds luxury to fine art and portraits.

styles.name: Silver Contemporary
styles.description: Polished silver frame with modern appeal. Built from 0.5-inch brushed metal with mitered corner joins.

styles.name: Espresso Gallery
styles.description: Deep espresso brown frame. Professional-grade finish for gallery walls and collections.

styles.name: Driftwood Rustic
styles.description: Weathered driftwood finish. Coastal and farmhouse charm for casual displays.

styles.name: Charcoal Slim
styles.description: Narrow charcoal frame with subtle texture. Minimalist option for modern art.

styles.name: Bronze Antique
styles.description: Vintage bronze frame with aged patina. Classic sophistication for traditional art.

styles.name: Champagne Beveled
styles.description: Beveled champagne frame with reflective finish. Elegant accent for portraits.

styles.name: Natural Pine
styles.description: Light pine wood with visible grain. Casual warmth for family photos.

styles.name: Navy Coastal
styles.description: Deep navy blue frame. Nautical appeal for beach and coastal themes.

styles.name: Sage Botanical
styles.description: Soft sage green frame. Nature-inspired choice for botanical prints.

styles.name: Cherry Wood
styles.description: Rich cherry wood with reddish hues. Formal elegance for certificates and diplomas.

styles.name: Maple Natural
styles.description: Light maple wood with smooth finish. Scandinavian simplicity for modern homes.

styles.name: Bamboo Eco
styles.description: Sustainable bamboo frame. Eco-friendly option with natural texture.

styles.name: Pewter Industrial
styles.description: Raw pewter metal frame. Industrial edge for loft and urban spaces.

styles.name: Ivory Classic
styles.description: Warm ivory frame with subtle cream undertones. Timeless choice for vintage photos.

styles.name: Mahogany Prestige
styles.description: Premium mahogany wood. Prestigious look for executive offices and formal settings.

styles.name: Copper Vintage
styles.description: Aged copper frame with warm metallic tones. Vintage charm for eclectic collections.

styles.name: Grey Wash
styles.description: Light grey washed wood. Modern farmhouse style for casual interiors.

styles.name: Red Oak Rustic
styles.description: Red oak with rustic finish. Warm country charm for cabin and lodge décor.

styles.name: Platinum Sleek
styles.description: Ultra-thin platinum metal frame. Sleek sophistication for modern photography.
